creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Hi,

thanks for submitting this patch, but I can't approve the proposed
patch. Although games/stonesoup builds after applying the patch, many
parts are missing. For example distinfo and pkg-plist files have to be
updated too. 

I have been working on a port upgrade on my own but got stuck with a
runtime problem. Each time I try to start stonesoup I get an error that
says that some unfinished string has been found in a *.des file, e.g.

	/usr/local/share/stonesoup/dat/des/branches/hells.des:432:
	unfinished string near ''human corpse / human skeleton, 
	'

I have been in touch with the upstream devs, but we haven't found a
solution yet. This is why I am holding this update back.

Nonetheless you could test my patch and tell me about your experiences.
Don't forget to backup your games/stonesoup directory before applying
the patch (to allow a rollback in the case you get the same error as
me).

Thanks for your support,

	Tobias
